case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. KAREN M CARRINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED NOV-16-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARRINGTON, KAREN M
